news.t: Praxis Launches Two Active Equity ETFs—PRXG and PRXV—for the ‘Heart of Your Portfolio'

holdings.infoBox: PRXV is an equity ETF with a total of 270 individual holdings. The top holdings are Micron Technology stock at 4.96%, JPMorgan Chase & Co. at 3.42%, Johnson & Johnson at 2.39%, Walmart at 2.15%, and Cisco Systems at 1.96%.

overview.description: The Praxis Impact Large Cap Value ETF (PRXV) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the CRSP US Large Cap Value index. The fund is an actively managed fund of equity securities, issued by large-cap US companies, exhibiting value characteristics. It selects stocks in line with its stewardship investing core values. PRXV was launched on Apr 8, 2025 and is issued by Praxis.
infoTable: CRSP US Large Cap Value Index

data.title: Praxis Launches Two Active Equity ETFs—PRXG and PRXV—for the ‘Heart of Your Portfolio'
data.text: GOSHEN, Ind.--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $PRXG--Praxis Investment Management, a leading faith-based investment manager, today launched its first two exchange-traded funds (ETFs).
